properties.property: {"id":5,"name":"Bill","x":12,"y":5,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 25","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbSet(2, pbGetStorageCreator)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bBill: Hello! I\u0027m \\v[2]."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI invented the Pok\u00E9mon Storage System."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$player.seen_storage_creator = true"]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bWhat do you want to know?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Wallpapers","Cancel"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Wallpapers"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bAll storage box wallpapers need to be listed in "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["class PokemonStorage, in def allWallpapers."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThey correspond to box_0.png, box_1.png, etc. in "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["order without gaps. These images are in the folder "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Graphics/Pictures/Storage."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bStorage wallpapers are split into two categories: "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["basic and special.All basic wallpapers are listed "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["before the special wallpapers."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bBasic wallpapers are always accessible, and "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["boxes use these wallpapers by default. Numbers 0 "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["to 15 inclusive are basic wallpapers."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bSpecial wallpapers start off locked and unavailable. "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["You can unlock them with pbUnlockWallpaper(id), "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["where id is the wallpaper\u0027s number."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":6,"name":"Town Map, size(2,1)","x":12,"y":1,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This event is size 2x1. It is 2 tiles wide and 1 tile tall. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["An event\u0027s size can be set by adding \u0022size(x,y)\u0022 in the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event\u0027s name, where x and y are numbers."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The event\u0027s placed position determines the bottom "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["left tile occupied by the event in-game."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["There are a lot of reasons to change an event\u0027s size. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Here, it is covering the whole wall map with just one "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event, rather than needing two events that do the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["same thing."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbShowMap"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":1,"name":"Nurse","x":7,"y":2,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC line of code sets the player\u0027s current position as "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the spot they will return to after they lose a battle "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["and lack out."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Page 2 of this event detects when this happens, and "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["heals the player\u0027s Pok\u00E9mon and wishes them better "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["luck in future."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbSetPokemonCenter"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rHello, and welcome to the Pok\u00E9mon Center."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rWe restore your tired Pok\u00E9mon to full health."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rWould you like to rest your Pok\u00E9mon?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rOK, I\u0027ll take your Pok\u00E9mon for a few seconds."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$stats.poke_center_count \u002B= 1"]},{"c":314,"i":1,"p":[0]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Nurse turns to face the healing they "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["are microscopic life-forms that attach to Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rWhile infected, Pok\u00E9mon are said to grow "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["exceptionally
